name: Pet Cone Recovery Collar - XXL (40CM)
description: Made from durable, easy-to-clean material, the collar offers excellent visibility while allowing your pet to move, rest, and eat with minimal disruption. The adjustable fastening system ensures a secure fit, while the lightweight design provides added comfort during recovery. Key Benefits: Prevents licking, biting, and scratching of wounds Ideal for post-surgery recovery and injury protection Adjustable and secure fit Clear design for improved visibility Durable, lightweight, and easy to clean Suitable for giant and extra-large breed dogs Recommended For: Rottweilers Alaskan Malamutes Bernese Mountain Dogs Other giant and extra-large breed dogs Size: XX-Large (40cm)
